rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Both required artifacts were produced with the exact filenames. The memo explicitly documents sheet/row layout, lists expected sheets (Inputs, Calculations, Sensitivity, Validation, Decision), and claims in-sheet formulas. rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Provide an explicit short table of the exact formula strings (e.g., sheet cell formulas) in the memo or include a text export of key formula cells to remove any ambiguity from OOXML generation; this will increase verifier confidence when automated parsing is unavailable.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Memo reproduces the core formulas (ratio = kLa/OUR; antifoam kLa *0.94? actually modeled as kLa*(1-0.06); agitation_up kLa*(1+0.15); foam adjustments +/-2 or +1) and shows numeric results that match packet inputs: R1 ratio 180/1421.2676, R2 136/1510.9007, R3 165/1481.1149. Optioned calculations (R1 antifoam kLa'=169.2, agitation_up kLa'=207, R3 agitation_up kLa'=189.75) and resulting ratios match arithmetic. Sensitivity checks (+/-5% on kLa') are present and consistent. Validation checks and missing-input handling are described in memo and trace. Spreadsheet parsing was not available in the grader environment, so arithmetic conformity is validated from memo + trace.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: The memo preview is truncated at the final 10x approval recommendation; ensure the final memo explicitly states the 10x approval decision (Approve/Conditionally Approve/Reject/Needs Review) and documents any operational mitigation steps and owners for follow-up action.

Recommendations and rationale for each run are present and actionable (e.g., preference and trade-offs between antifoam and agitation_up).
